ingredients.item: 60 g (2 oz/⅔ cup) desiccated (dried shredded) coconut
ingredients.original: 60 g (2 oz/⅔ cup) desiccated (dried shredded) coconut

ingredients.item: 200 ml (7 fl oz/scant 1 cup) soya milk
ingredients.original: 200 ml (7 fl oz/scant 1 cup) soya milk

ingredients.item: 50 g (2 oz/generous ¼ cup) soft brown sugar
ingredients.original: 50 g (2 oz/generous ¼ cup) soft brown sugar

ingredients.item: 50 g (2 oz/scant ½ cup) plain flour
ingredients.original: 50 g (2 oz/scant ½ cup) plain flour

ingredients.item: 50 g (2 oz/generous ¼ cup) light brown soft sugar
ingredients.original: 50 g (2 oz/generous ¼ cup) light brown soft sugar

ingredients.item: 50 g (2 oz) vegan block butter, plus extra for greasing
ingredients.original: 50 g (2 oz) vegan block butter, plus extra for greasing

ingredients.item: Preheat the oven to 170°C (375°F/gas 5). Grease a 900 g (2 lb/9 x 5 x 3 inch) loaf tin (pan) with butter and line lengthways with baking parchment, with the paper overhanging the ends of the tin, so that the cake will be easy to remove once baked.
ingredients.original: Preheat the oven to 170°C (375°F/gas 5). Grease a 900 g (2 lb/9 x 5 x 3 inch) loaf tin (pan) with butter and line lengthways with baking parchment, with the paper overhanging the ends of the tin, so that the cake will be easy to remove once baked.
